items.title: Export to Word (.docx) with proper formatting
items.description: Generate Word documents with headers, styles, TOC. Use docx.js or pandoc.

items.title: Export to PDF with chapter layout
items.description: Generate PDF with table of contents, page numbers, chapter breaks.

items.title: Full manuscript compile (all arcs)
items.description: Combine all arcs into single manuscript with proper ordering, title page, TOC.

items.title: Cloud backup (S3/Google Drive)
items.description: Auto-backup to cloud storage with configurable schedule. Manual backup button.

items.title: Split-pane editor (edit left, preview right)
items.description: Side-by-side editing with sync scroll. Use CodeMirror/Monaco for syntax highlighting.

items.title: Markdown formatting toolbar
items.description: Toolbar buttons for bold, italic, headers, links, lists, quotes, code.

items.title: Find and replace in document
items.description: Cmd+F to find, Cmd+Shift+F to find/replace. Highlight matches.

items.title: Spell check integration
items.description: Red underline for misspellings, right-click to correct. Use browser API or library.

items.title: Hierarchical chapter/folder structure
items.description: Tree view with arcs > chapters > stories. Collapsible sections.

items.title: Drag-and-drop story reordering
items.description: Reorder stories within arcs/chapters via drag-and-drop. Persist order to JSON.

items.title: Version history with snapshots
items.description: Auto-save creates snapshots. View/restore previous versions. Diff view.

items.title: Comprehensive keyboard shortcuts
items.description: Cmd+S save, Cmd+K quick switch, Cmd+N new, Cmd+B/I bold/italic, etc. Help modal.

items.title: Mobile-responsive design
items.description: Optimize dashboard for mobile/tablet. Collapsible nav, touch-friendly.

items.title: Daily/weekly writing stats tracking
items.description: Track words written per day. Chart progress over time. Store in _stats.json.

items.title: Comment/annotation system
items.description: Add comments to text ranges. Display in margin. Resolve/delete comments.

items.title: Focus/distraction-free mode
items.description: Fullscreen mode hiding nav and chrome. Esc to exit. Optional typewriter scroll.

items.title: Word count goals per story/session
items.description: Set target word count. Show progress bar. Optional session goals.

items.title: Export to EPUB
items.description: Generate EPUB for e-readers. Include metadata, cover, chapters.

items.title: Medium API direct publishing
items.description: OAuth flow to authenticate. Publish as draft or public. Store URL in frontmatter.

items.title: Character/people profile cards
items.description: Create profiles for recurring people. Link appearances across stories.

items.title: Inline AI writing suggestions
items.description: Tab to accept AI continuation. Ctrl+Space to trigger. Use Claude API.

items.title: Auto-tag themes from content
items.description: Analyze story content to suggest themes. Add to frontmatter on confirm.

items.title: Light/dark mode toggle
items.description: Switch between dark and light themes. Save preference to localStorage.

items.title: Quick switcher (Cmd+K)
items.description: Fuzzy search to jump to any story. Show recent files. Navigate with arrows.

items.title: Generate shareable preview links
items.description: Create public or password-protected preview URL for stories/arcs.

items.title: Story templates (memoir, reflection, technical)
items.description: Pre-built templates with prompts and structure for different story types.

items.title: Image attachment support
items.description: Upload images to story folder. Insert markdown image syntax.

items.title: Writing streak tracker
items.description: Track consecutive days with writing. Show streak on dashboard. Celebrate milestones.

items.title: Feedback collection system
items.description: Beta readers can leave comments on shared stories. Review in dashboard.

items.title: Document merge tool
items.description: Select multiple stories to merge into one. Choose order, add transitions.

items.title: Trash/deleted items recovery
items.description: Move deleted stories to trash. View/restore within 30 days. Permanent delete option.

items.title: Research notes folder
items.description: Separate section for research notes, reference materials, links.

items.title: Story-to-story linking (internal refs)
items.description: [[wiki-style]] links between stories. Backlinks display. Related stories panel.

items.title: Footnote support
items.description: Markdown footnote syntax. Render as hover or bottom of page.

items.title: Style consistency checker
items.description: AI checks for consistent tone, POV, tense across stories in same arc.

items.title: Similar content finder
items.description: Find stories with overlapping content to merge or deduplicate.

items.title: Tone/voice analyzer
items.description: Analyze writing style. Show metrics: formal vs casual, active vs passive.

items.title: Summarize for Medium generator
items.description: Generate Medium-optimized summary, title suggestions, and tags.

items.title: Git-based version control integration
items.description: Auto-commit on save. View git history in UI. Push to remote.

items.title: Export full project backup (zip)
items.description: Download entire LexDocs folder as timestamped zip file.

items.title: Progress toward completion goals
items.description: Set target word count or story count per arc. Show % complete.

items.title: Productivity charts over time
items.description: Line/bar charts showing writing volume over weeks/months.

items.title: Per-arc completion percentage
items.description: Based on status counts, show how close each arc is to complete.

items.title: Full-screen editing mode
items.description: F11 or button to go fullscreen. Hide browser chrome.

items.title: Font size/family customization
items.description: Settings to change editor font size and family (mono, serif, sans).

items.title: Password-protected sharing
items.description: Set password on shared links. Require auth to view.

items.title: Beta reader management
items.description: Invite beta readers by email. Track who has read what.

items.title: Keyboard shortcut help modal
items.description: Press ? or Cmd+/ to show all available shortcuts.

items.title: Random story button for review
items.description: Pick a random story to read and review. Good for rediscovery.

items.title: Bulk status change
items.description: Select multiple stories, change status all at once.

items.title: Recent edits list on dashboard
items.description: Show 5 most recently edited stories for quick access.

items.title: Favorite/star stories
items.description: Mark stories as favorites. Filter to show only favorites.

items.title: Export to Kindle (MOBI)
items.description: Generate MOBI format for Kindle. May require external converter.

items.title: Custom export templates
items.description: Define custom templates for different export formats/styles.

items.title: Substack publishing integration
items.description: Publish directly to Substack newsletter. Similar to Medium flow.

items.title: Print-ready formatting
items.description: Export with print margins, page breaks, running headers for physical book.

items.title: Web link clipper
items.description: Save web pages as reference material. Extract text and metadata.

items.title: Expand this inline action
items.description: Select text, click expand to have AI elaborate on that section.

items.title: Scheduled auto-backups
items.description: Configure daily/weekly backup schedule. Run in background.

items.title: Reading level analysis
items.description: Calculate Flesch-Kincaid score. Show grade level of writing.

items.title: Sentiment analysis by arc
items.description: Analyze emotional tone across arcs. Visualize mood progression.

items.title: Time tracking per story
items.description: Track time spent editing each story. Show on dashboard.

items.title: Reading time estimate
items.description: Show estimated reading time based on word count (200 wpm).

items.title: Book outline view with nesting
items.description: Collapsible tree view showing full book structure.

items.title: Fix Timeline and Topics visualization bugs
items.description: Timeline not rendering events, Topics network graph empty. Debug and fix.
